nl_query: Which programs have prerequisite relationships defined in the system?
failed_sql:
SELECT au.id, au.name, au.code, acu.code AS course_code, acu.is_active, acu.academic_year
FROM   academic_unit_relationship aur
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = aur.from_unit_id
JOIN   academic_unit_closure acu ON acu.descendant_id = au.id
JOIN   relationship_type_config rtc ON aur.relationship_type = rtc.relationship_type
WHERE  rtc.relationship_type = 'PREREQUISITE'
  AND  au.unit_type = 'PROGRAM'
  AND  acu.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY au.id, au.name, au.code, acu.code, acu.is_active, acu.academic_year
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'au.relationship_type' does not exist. The Postgres planner suggests 'rtc.relationship_type' — use that, or verify the column belongs to the qualifying table in your FROM/JOIN clauses.
